• Item
  • Changelogs

Wind Waker is an item purchasable at the Base Shop, under Magical. However, it can only be completed with items from the Secret Shop.

Wind Waker
Proof enough to some that unseen forces manipulate the happenings of the material plane.
Magical
Cost 6800 (1400)
Sell Value 3400
Active Cyclone
Bonus ? +35 Intelligence
+3 Mana Regeneration
+30 Move Speed
Shareable 0
Disassemble 0
Usage Alert ? 0
Recipe

Additional Information

[edit]
  • This item is shown as a Team Item in the shop window when purchased by an ally.
    • If a Eul's Scepter of Divinity was purchased as well, Wind Waker's icon takes priority.
  • The item's attributes grant the following additional stats:
    • 420 mana, 1.75 mana regeneration and 3.5% flat base magic resistance.
    • 35 main attack damage to heroes.
    • 15.75 main attack damage to universal heroes.
  • Stacks with all other movement speed bonuses.
  • Purges first, then applies Cyclone modifier.

Ability

[edit]

Cyclone

[edit]
Cyclone
▶️
Ability
Unit
Affects
Allies / Enemies
Damage
Spell / Magical
Sweeps the target up into a cyclone, applying a basic dispel, turning them invulnerable for a short while.
Cast Animation: 0 + 0
Cast Range:  550
Pathing Blocker Size: 24
Duration: 2.5
If the target is an enemy, they also take damage upon landing.
Damage: 50
If the target is the wielder, they can move freely at a fixed speed, but are still unable to attack or cast abilities or items. Gains free pathing and ignores turn rates.
Set Speed: 300
Cannot lift up Roshan, instead, it instantly applies the damage.
19
175
  • Details
  • Status Effects
  • Show All
Cooldown Sharing
The items listed above share their cooldowns;
Casting one of them puts them all on cooldown.
  • ↓↓ Double-tapping automatically target self.
  • Applies a basic dispel and Cyclone effect on the target upon cast, turning it invulnerable and fully disabled.
    • The Cyclone duration is not affected by status resistance.
    • If cast on self, silences, mutes and disarms the target, instead of fully disabling them.
      • This also applies when targeting own clones or when clones use this ability on their original hero.
  • Cyclone first applies the dispel, then the cyclone modifier.
  • Cannot target wards, buildings, invulnerable or hidden units.
  • While cycloned, the affected unit is moved upwards and has no collision.
    • However, a 24-radius pathing blocker is created at the base of the affected unit while active.
  • The magical spell damage is applied at the end of the duration. If the cyclone gets dispelled, it still applies the damage as soon as the target lands.
    • The damage is only applied to enemy targets.
modifier_eul_wind_waker_thinker
On hidden entity
modifier_wind_waker
Cyclone: Swept up in a cyclone, you are invulnerable and unable to act.

MODIFIER_EVENT_ON_ORDER_RECEIVED
MODIFIER_PROPERTY_TRANSLATE_ACTIVITY_MODIFIERS

Recommended Heroes

[edit]

Heroes whose default item build includes Eul's Scepter of Divinity as a core item can upgrade item to Wind Waker during late game:

Trivia

[edit]
  • The item's name may be a reference to The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker

Gallery
